predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second (deceased) person.

predicates.name: leaves_descendants
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves descendants (including adopted children or descendants of adopted children).

predicates.name: is_part_of_estate_of
predicates.description: The asset forms part of the estate of the deceased person.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_entire_estate
predicates.description: The first person (surviving spouse) acquires the usufruct of the entire estate of the second person (deceased) as a legal consequence.
